Interface IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX
Assembly
ESRI.Server.CartoX.dll

Provides access to the dimension feature class extension.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("0F9409F2-6186-48D7-B614-A721033D1514")]
public interface IMEDimensionClassExtensionBridge

Properties

Build

The build number of the dimension feature class. Used for internal purposes.

string Build { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

CIMVersion

The CIM Version of the dimension feature class.

string CIMVersion { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DimensionStylesJSON

A JSON string representing the collection of dimension styles associated with the dimension feature class.

string DimensionStylesJSON { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FieldIndexes

Get the field indexes

IntPtr FieldIndexes { get; }

Property Value

IntPtr

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxStyleID

The maximum style ID in the style collection.

int MaxStyleID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReferenceScale

The reference scale of the dimension feature class.

double ReferenceScale { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReferenceScaleUnit

The reference scale units of the dimension feature class. Only applicable if the feature class has an unknown coordinate system.

IUnit ReferenceScaleUnit { get; set; }

Property Value

IUnit

Examples

Sample Snippet

Version

The version of the dimension feature class. Used for internal purposes.

short Version { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Sample Snippet

Methods

ResetProperties()

Resets the in state of the dimension feature class properties to what is persisted in the dataset.

void ResetProperties()

Examples

Sample Snippet

UpdateProperties()

Updates the dimension feature class' properties from the current state of this object.

void UpdateProperties()
